name: Hunan Baili Engineering Sci&Tech Co.,Ltd
summary: Hunan Baili Engineering Sci&Tech Co.,Ltd provides engineering consulting and design, procurement, construction, and project management services in China and internationally. The company offers its services primarily for petrochemical and coal chemical industries covering the fields of petroleum refining, chemical raw materials, synthetic fiber, synthetic rubber, synthetic resins, and coal chemicals, as well as oil and gas storage and transportation. Hunan Baili Engineering Sci&Tech Co.,Ltd is based in Yueyang, China.
